title: Workflow Settings
description: Configure workflow service settings and order screen contracts

screenContracts.statusesHint: Comma-separated workflow statuses. For screen new_order, the first status is the create-order status on New Order.
screenContracts.additionalFiltersHint: Optional JSON object for extra query filters
screenContracts.deleteConfirmDesc: Delete the override for "{screen}"? The system default will apply again.
screenContracts.systemReadonly: System defaults are read-only. Create a tenant override to customize.

errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to manage workflow settings
errors.DUPLICATE_SCREEN_KEY: A tenant override already exists for this screen
errors.NOT_FOUND_OR_SYSTEM: Only tenant overrides can be edited or deleted
errors.STATUSES_REQUIRED: At least one status is required
errors.INVALID_FILTERS_JSON: Additional filters must be valid JSON object
